name: clawclub
description: Open source software for agent-native private member networks

scripts.test:integration:non-llm: for f in test/integration/smoke.test.ts test/integration/memberships.test.ts test/integration/messages.test.ts test/integration/profiles.test.ts test/integration/admin.test.ts test/integration/admissions.test.ts test/integration/cross-apply.test.ts test/integration/removal.test.ts test/integration/events.test.ts test/integration/signals.test.ts test/integration/similarity.test.ts test/integration/matches.test.ts test/integration/synchronicity.test.ts test/integration/billing-sync.test.ts; do node --experimental-strip-types --test "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.test:integration:with-llm: set -a && . ./.env.local && set +a && for f in test/integration/content.test.ts test/integration/llm-gated.test.ts test/integration/quality-gate.test.ts; do node --experimental-strip-types --test "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.test:integration:all: npm run test:integration:non-llm && npm run test:integration:with-llm
